positive: A minimalist, highly contrasting geometric pattern featuring stylized forest creatures (fox, owl, fox, deer) interlocking within abstracted natural elements like moons and stars. The design should use thick, clean silhouettes against a clean, solid background (white or light cream). Limited color palette of deep emerald green, burnt orange, and charcoal gray. Central composition, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat illustration style, vector art quality, kawaii aesthetic, perfect repetition potential, negative space emphasized. Style of sophisticated Scandinavian textile design.
